title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Properties is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
